TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Irou ka k'ytt'an [ti Jesus] ki Pakoi-laulau-an ki ta'u, ni-mah-dakkun tou voukyn, ka dou mi-roung ni-irouä ta Pahtatæuæu-tæuæu-han tyn.
Irou ka k'ytt'an [ti Jesus] ki Pakoi-laulau-an ki ta'u, ni-mah-dakkun tou voukyn, ka dou mi-roung ni-irouä ta Pahtatæuæu-tæuæu-han tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende [Jesus] de scharen Efiende is gheklommen op eenen bergh ende als hp neder geseten was quamen fijne Discipelen tot hem.
And seeing the multitudes, he went up into a mountain: and when he was set, his disciples came unto him:
耶穌看見這許多的人，就上了山，既已坐下，門徒到他跟前來，

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-luhtou-as ki mon-tous tyn, ni-mahtæu-tæu ugh neini-an, koun,
Ka rou ni-luhtou-as ki mon-tous tyn, ni-mahtæu-tæu ugh neini-an, koun,
S.TRANSL: Endesynen mondt geopent hebbende leerde haer seggende â€”
And he opened his mouth, and taught them, saying,
他就開口教訓他們，說： （路6‧20－23）

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mali-mouk ki I-oep-an; Alei ka a-neni-ah ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mali-mouk ki I-oep-an; Alei ka a-neni-ah ta Pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Saligh [zijn] de arme yan geelte: Want haerer is her koninckriick der Hemeen.
Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
虛心的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mava-voulas; Alei ka paka-hani-ap-eih ta neni.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mava-voulas; Alei ka paka-hani-ap-eih ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Saligh [rijo] die treuren: Want sy sullen bertrooft worden.
Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.
哀慟的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mah-ah-pugh pugh ki ryh; alei ka tabli-eih nein ta Næi
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mah-ah-pugh pugh ki ryh; alei ka tabli-eih nein ta Næi
S.TRANSL: Saligh [rijo] de fachtmormordight : Want sy fullen't aertriick be-erben.
Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.
溫柔的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mahg-ang-ei ta maÿttou ki katiktik an: alei ka paka-vangtau-auh ta neni.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta mahg-ang-ei ta maÿttou ki katiktik an: alei ka paka-vangtau-auh ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Saligh [rijo] die hongeren ende dorsten [na] de gerechtighept : Want sy sullen bersadight worden.
Blessed are they which do hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.
飢渴慕義的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta tama-kaharum: alei ka kaharim-auh ta neni
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta tama-kaharum: alei ka kaharim-auh ta neni
S.TRANSL: Saligh[rija]debarmhertige: Want haer sal barmhertighepdt gelchieden ,
Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.
憐恤人的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta ma-kouptigh ki ryh: ka mararau-ah ki Alid ta neni.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta ma-kouptigh ki ryh: ka mararau-ah ki Alid ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Saligh [rijo] de reyne ban herten : Want sy sullen Godt lien.
Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.
清心的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ta tama-pa-pareia, ka pa-nanang-eih alalak ki Alid ta neni.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ta tama-pa-pareia, ka pa-nanang-eih alalak ki Alid ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Gboaligh [rijo] de breedsame: Want sy ullen Godts kinderen genaemt worden.
Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.
使人和睦的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang ka kou-dylloug-in alei ki katiktik-an: ka â-neni ta pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Tama-tæ'i-riang ka kou-dylloug-in alei ki katiktik-an: ka â-neni ta pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Saligh [rijo] die berbolgt worden om der gerechtigheyt wille: Want harer 18 het honinckrijk der Hemele.
Blessed are they which are persecuted for righteousness' sake: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
為義受逼迫的人有福了！

S.FORM: Tama-tæ'i-riang-kamou dou bavarug-ah kmou-dyllough ymouni-æn [ta kaeuloung] dou mahkou-avavag-ah mahkou-doumma ym-mid ki sou ka assi mariang mattæ'i-harang ymou-mi-æn, al-ei jau-an-da.
Tama-tæ'i-riang-kamou dou bavarug-ah kmou-dyllough ymouni-æn [ta kaeuloung] dou mahkou-avavag-ah mahkou-doumma ym-mid ki sou ka assi mariang mattæ'i-harang ymou-mi-æn, alei jau-an-da.
S.TRANSL: Saligh zijt ghy als u [ de menschen} fmaden ende berbolghen ende lieghende alle quaet teghen u spreecken om mijnent wille.
Blessed are ye, when men shall revile you, and persecute you, and shall say all manner of evil against you falsely, for my sake.
「人若因我辱罵你們，逼迫你們，捏造各樣壞話毀謗你們，你們就有福了！

S.FORM: Maraei-ja, malabang-â-appa ki rÿh, alei ka ma-dagh ta 'ou-vavarg-han-oumi tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum-da: ka ni-kou-dyllough k'ma-hyna ta Tama-mat-tæ'i-tan, ka ni-si-nḡada ymoumi-au.
Maraei-ja, malabang-â-appa ki rÿh, alei ka ma-dagh ta 'ou-vavarg-han-oumi tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum-da: ka ni-kou-dyllough k'ma-hyna ta Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka ni-si-nḡada ymoumi-au.
S.TRANSL: Desblijd efiberheught [u, ] want uwen loon [ is] groot in de Hemelen: want alsoo hebben sy berbolght de Propheten die Voor u [ gheweeftzijn] _ .
Rejoice, and be exceeding glad: for great is your reward in heaven: for so persecuted they the prophets which were before you.
應當歡喜快樂，因為你們在天上的賞賜是大的。在你們以前的先知，人也是這樣逼迫他們。」 （可9‧50；路14‧34－35）

S.FORM: Vaija-kamou ki Næi ta ymoumi; irou ka mitamsi ta vaija, paka-hæǣr-aul-ato ki mang? Assi-Assi-ato mariang amamang, dyk subu-an-eih smaki-mala, ka g'it-git-auh ki ka'æuloung.
Vaija-kamou ki Næi ta ymoumi; irou ka mitamsi ta vaija, paka-hæǣr-aul-ato ki mang? Assi-Assi-ato mariang amamang, dyk subu-an-eih smaki-mala, ka g'it-git-auh ki ka'æuloung.
S.TRANSL: Ghp3ht het sout der arrde : indien nu het out fmakeloos wort waer mede sal [ het] gesouten wordens Het en denght nergens toe meer dan om buyten geworpen endeban de menschen bertreden te worden,
Ye are the salt of the earth: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be salted? it is thenceforth good for nothing, but to be cast out, and to be trodden under foot of men.
「你們是世上的鹽。鹽若失了味，怎能叫它再鹹呢？以後無用，不過丟在外面，被人踐踏了。

S.FORM: Ræmæh ki ymmid ki Næi ta ymoumi: assi hmahei itou-dung ta euma ka pou-voukkyn-nen-da.
Ræmæh ki ymmid ki Næi ta ymoumi: assi hmahei itou-dung ta euma ka pou-voukkyn-nen-da.
S.TRANSL: Ghy zijt het licht der werelt: een stadt boben op eenen bergh liggende en kan niet berborgen zijn. :
Ye are the light of the world. A city that is set on an hill cannot be hid.
你們是世上的光。城造在山上是不能隱藏的。

S.FORM: Ka assi tll'an ta euyng, ka pa-itou-rbo-eil-ato ki satoL râ pa-itou-koun-appa tou pæu-ä-euyng-en, ka mæu yng-ah ymmid neini-æn ka tou talagh-da.
Ka assi tll'an ta euyng, ka pa-itou-rbo-eil-ato ki satoL râ pa-itou-koun-appa tou pæu-ä-euyng-en, ka mæu yng-ah ymmid neini-æn ka tou talagh-da.
S.TRANSL: Nocth men sterckt geen Keersse aen ende set die onder een kooren-mate: maer op eenen kandelaer ende sy schijne allen die in den huyse [zijn.]
Neither do men light a candle, and put it under a bushel, but on a candlestick; and it giveth light unto all that are in the house.
人點燈，不放在斗底下，是放在燈臺上，就照亮一家的人。

S.FORM: Paka-ræmæ'-æu k'ma-hynna ta ræmæh-oumi tou æmæh ki ka'-euloung, ka kmytt'-ah ki na ring-ei-oumi ka mariang, ka paka-irang-al-appa ki kidi ki Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Paka-ræmæ'-æu k'ma-hynna ta ræmæh-oumi tou æmæh ki ka'-euloung, ka kmytt'-ah ki na ring-ei-oumi ka mariang, ka paka-irang-al-appa ki kidi ki Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Laet uw' licht alsod frhjjnen boor de menschen dat sy nwe goede wercken mogen sien ende uwen Dader die in de Hemelen is berheerlicken.
Let your light so shine before men, that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father which is in heaven.
你們的光也當這樣照在人前，叫他們看見你們的好行為，便將榮耀歸給你們在天上的父。」

S.FORM: Ynna pæg-dimdim ka-iroua-tou-koh ki'æu-ka-kirig-au-mau ta Tatouhko lava, ta [na sou] lava ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan; Assi-koh ni-irouha ki'æu-kaki-rig-au-mau, alei-appa ka pam't-au-mau [ki anna].
Ynna pæg-dimdim ka-iroua-tou-koh ki'æu-ka-kirig-au-mau ta Tatouhko lava, ta [na sou] lava ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan; Assi-koh ni-irouha ki'æu-kaki-rig-au-mau, alei-appa ka pam't-au-mau [ki anna].
S.TRANSL: Meypnt niet dat ick gekomen ben om de Wet ofte de Propheten te oncbinden : Ick en ben niet gekomen om [die] te ontbinden maer te berwullen.
Think not that I am come to destroy the law, or the prophets: I am not come to destroy, but to fulfil.
「莫想我來要廢掉律法和先知。我來不是要廢掉，乃是要成全。

S.FORM: Ka missing koun-nau-ka-mou-ra, Tou kidi-appa k'anna ka mali-æuræ-ah ta vullum ki Næi, assi mali-æuræ-ah ta Jota ka saäsat, ki tungæus-appa ka saäsat ki Ta-touhko, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pæh-kaha-auh pamut ta ymmud ki mamang-da.

Ka missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, Tou kidi-appa k'anna ka mali-æuræ-ah ta vullum ki Næi, assi mali-æuræ-ah ta Jota ka saäsat, ki tungæus-appa ka saäsat ki Tatouhko, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pæh-kaha-auh pamut ta ymmud ki mamang-da.
S.TRANSL: Want boorwaer seggeickn Tot dat de Hemel ende de Aerde boorrby gaen en sal daer niet een jota noch een tittelban de Wet boorby gaen tot dat het alles sal zyn geschiet. 19 Soo wie dan een ban dese dese minfte gheboden sal ontbonden ende de menschen alsoo sal geleert hebben [die] sal de minste ghenaemt worden in het Honinckrijcke der Hemelen : Maer soo wie [de felbe] sal gedaenende geleert hebben die sal groot ghenaemt worden in het Koninckrijcke der Hemelen.
For verily I say unto you, Till heaven and earth pass, one jot or one tittle shall in no wise pass from the law, till all be fulfilled.
我實在告訴你們，就是到天地都廢去了，律法的一點一畫也不能廢去，都要成全。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta maæu-ka-ki-kirigh ki saäsat ki na a-moummou-an ka si-ourou oussi-oussyn, ka matæutæuuh-al-ato k'ma-hynna ki kaeuloung, pa-ousi-oussying-eih ta teni Ma-nanang tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ka vullu-vullum: Râ ti-mamang ta pam't-âl-ato ka mah-tæutæuuh-âl-ato [ki anna] pa-irang-eih ma-nanang tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.

Ti-mamang ta maæu-ka-ki-kirigh ki saäsat ki na a-moummou-an ka si-ourou oussi-oussyn, ka matæutæuuh-al-ato k'ma-hynna ki kaeuloung, pa-ousi-oussying-eih ta teni Ma-nanang tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ka vullu-vullum: Râ ti-mamang ta pam't-âl-ato ka mah-tæutæuuh-âl-ato [ki anna] pa-irang-eih ma-nanang tou pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Whosoever therefore shall break one of these least commandments, and shall teach men so, he shall be called the least in the kingdom of heaven: but whosoever shall do and teach them, the same shall be called great in the kingdom of heaven.
所以，無論何人廢掉這誡命中最小的一條，又教訓人這樣做，他在天國要稱為最小的。但無論何人遵行這誡命，又教訓人遵行，他在天國要稱為大的。

S.FORM: Ka pa-sousou-en-nau-ka-mou-ra, Dou assi mafa-oun-ah ma-houvar ta katiktik-an-oumi ki katiktik-an ki Makou-sasoulat ki Fariseen-appa, assi-kamou mou-rbo-ah ki pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Ka pa-sousou-en-nau-ka-mou-ra, Dou assi mafa-oun-ah ma-houvar ta katiktik-an-oumi ki katiktik-an ki Makou-sasoulat ki Fariseen-appa, assi-kamou mou-rbo-ah ki pei-sasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Want ick segge u t En zy uwe gerechtigheydt oberbloedigher ry als Der ear k de arireen dat ghy in het oninckryck de Hemelen geensins en sult in gaen.
For I say unto you, That except your righteousness shall exceed the righteousness of the scribes and Pharisees, ye shall in no case enter into the kingdom of heaven.
我告訴你們，你們的義若不勝於文士和法利賽人的義，斷不能進天國。」

S.FORM: Ni-illing-ghen-oumi ka ni-pou-pænæh-en ki fou ki na Ma-moumou-an, Assi-kow luhpoug-ah: râ ti-mamang ta luhpoug-alato, si-darim-ah ki Papæmæmæ-en-da.
Ni-illing-ghen-oumi ka ni-pou-pænæh-en ki fou ki na Ma-moumou-an, Assi-kow luhpoug-ah: râ ti-mamang ta luhpoug-alato, si-darim-ah ki Papæmæmæ-en-da.
S.TRANSL: Ghy hebt gehoort dat [ban] den Ouden geseght is Gy en [ult met dooden: maer foo wie doodet die][al irafbaer zijn door het Gerichte.
Ye have heard that it was said of them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger of the judgment:
「你們聽見有吩咐古人的話，說：『不可殺人』；又說：『凡殺人的難免受審判。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta kma ymoumi-æn; Ti-mamang ta ma-nynno ma; voulas ki tæ'i-ä-ppara tyn, si-darim-ah ki pa-pæmæmæ-en-da. Ti-ma-mang ta ma-nanang-ah ki tæ'i-appara tyn Maryngaryng, si-darim-ah ki Peuï-saäl-an ka keirang-en. Râ ti-mamang ta k'ma-ah ki sou Marymmang, si-darim-ah ki apoei ki kalæuæu-en-ra.

Râ ti jau ta kma ymoumi-æn; Ti-mamang ta ma-nynno ma; voulas ki tæ'i-ä-ppara tyn, si-darim-ah ki pa-pæmæmæ-en-da. Ti-ma-mang ta ma-nanang-ah ki tæ'i-appara tyn Maryngaryng, si-darim-ah ki Peuï-saäl-an ka keirang-en. Râ ti-mamang ta k'ma-ah ki sou Marymmang, si-darim-ah ki apoei ki kalæuæu-en-ra.
S.TRANSL: Doch ick segghe n: wie t onrecht op synen totder toornigh 1s die sal sthafbaer zijn door het Gherichte. Ende wie tot fijnen broeder seght Kaka die sal rafbaer zijn door den Grooten-Kaedt. Mae: wieseght Ghy dwaes die sal ft-af baer zijn doo? het helsche byer.

But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother without a cause shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of hell fire.
只是我告訴你們，凡向弟兄動怒的，難免受審判；凡罵弟兄是拉加的，難免公會的審判；凡罵弟兄是魔利的，難免地獄的火。

S.FORM: Nda, irou ka 'ad-au-'mhou ka p'hgik-eih ta pæp-æp-æu-hou tou itou-qu'an pihgik; ka hi-balei-au-au-'mhou hynna, ka akou-sou ki pattæ'i-voulas-in tou doumma ym-hou-an ta tæ'i-ä-ppara-hou,
Nda, irou ka 'ad-au-'mhou ka p'hgik-eih ta pæp-æp-æu-hou tou itou-qu'an pihgik; ka hi-balei-au-au-'mhou hynna, ka akou-sou ki pattæ'i-voulas-in tou doumma ym-hou-an ta tæ'i-ä-ppara-hou,
S.TRANSL: Soo ghy dan uwe gabe sult op den altaer offeren ; ende aldaer gedachtigh e wordt wordt dat uw' broeder yet tegen u heeft
Therefore if thou bring thy gift to the altar, and there rememberest that thy brother hath ought against thee;
所以，你在祭壇上獻禮物的時候，若想起弟兄向你懷怨，

S.FORM: Atta-ral-ei hynna ta pæp-æp-æu-'hou tou douma ki itou-quan pihgik, nda 'on-koua, ma-aurou-â mareia ki tæ'i-ä-ppara oho, dou-mia ka mou-qua pihgik ki pæp-æp-æu-hou.
Atta-ral-ei hynna ta pæp-æp-æu-'hou tou douma ki itou-quan pihgik, nda 'on-koua, ma-aurou-â mareia ki tæ'i-ä-ppara oho, dou-mia ka mou-qua pihgik ki pæp-æp-æu-hou.
S.TRANSL: Laet daer nwe gabe boor den altaer ende gaet henen bersoent u eerrlt met uwen Broeder ende komt dan ende offert uwe gabe,
Leave there thy gift before the altar, and go thy way; first be reconciled to thy brother, and then come and offer thy gift.
就把禮物留在壇前，先去同弟兄和好，然後來獻禮物。

S.FORM: Madys-a pa-tmyla ki rÿh ki ka-tavæh-en-hou ka ni-makou-doumma ymhou-an, dou ǣ'ia-lam-appa-kow tyni-æn tou darang, kou assi lava pæ'æ-tounnoun-ah ym-hou-an ta Katavæh-en-hou ki Ta-ma-pæmæmæh, ka pæ'æ-tounnou-tounoun-al-appa ymhou-an ta Tama-pæmæmæh ki tæyngidd, ka tæyng'd-deil-ato kow pou-sangat.

Madys-a pa-tmyla ki rÿh ki ka-tavæh-en-hou ka ni-makou-doumma ymhou-an, dou ǣ'ia-lam-appa-kow tyni-æn tou darang, kou assi lava pæ'æ-tounnoun-ah ym-hou-an ta Katavæh-en-hou ki Ta-ma-pæmæmæh, ka pæ'æ-tounnou-tounoun-al-appa ymhou-an ta Tama-pæmæmæh ki tæyngidd, ka tæyng'd-deil-ato kow pou-sangat.
S.TRANSL: Weeft haelt lick wel ghesine [treghen] uwe wederpartije tewhyle ghy noch met hem op den wegh zijt : op dat de weder partije niec milichien u den Rechter oberlebere ende de Rechter u den Dienaer oberlebere ende gy in de gebangenise geworpen wordt. .

Agree with thine adversary quickly, whiles thou art in the way with him; lest at any time the adversary deliver thee to the judge, and the judge deliver thee to the officer, and thou be cast into prison.
你同告你的對頭還在路上，就趕緊與他和息，恐怕他把你送給審判官，審判官交付衙役，你就下在監裏了。

S.FORM: D'illigh koun-nau-kamou-ra, assi kow mou-pæ-næ-'ah hynna tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pæ'æ-kaha-kow pæ'æ-tarymmok-ah ki siouro ka makoussing ki assa ka loumari.
D'illigh koun-nau-kamou-ra, assi kow mou-pæ-næ-'ah hynna tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pæ'æ-kaha-kow pæ'æ-tarymmok-ah ki siouro ka makoussing ki assa ka loumari.
S.TRANSL: Doorwae ick fegge u ghy en sult daer geensing upt komen tot dat ghy den laetfien pemning sult betaelt Hebben,
Verily I say unto thee, Thou shalt by no means come out thence, till thou hast paid the uttermost farthing.
我實在告訴你，若有一文錢沒有還清，你斷不能從那裏出來。」

S.FORM: Ni-illing-hen-oumi ka ni-pou-pænæ'-æn, Assi kow mou-zou-zoung-ah ki ni-mǣ-æmæh maka-kyttil.
Ni-illing-hen-oumi ka ni-pou-pænæ'-æn, Assi kow mou-zou-zoung-ah ki ni-mǣ-æmæh maka-kyttil.
S.TRANSL: Ghy hebt gehoort dat [yan] den Ouden geseght is Shy en sult geen oberspel en,
Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not commit adultery:
「你們聽見有話說：『不可姦淫。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-an, ti-mamang ta mas-aou-moei mararau ki Ina, dæh-kahâ-to rbou-rbo tyni-æn tou tyntin tyn.
Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-an, ti-mamang ta mas-aou-moei mararau ki Ina, dæh-kahâ-to rbou-rbo tyni-æn tou tyntin tyn.
S.TRANSL: Maet ick segge u Dat soo wie een brouwe [aen-siet om deselbe te begeeren] die Heeft alreede oberspel in ijn herte met haer gedaen.
But I say unto you, That whosoever looketh on a woman to lust after her hath committed adultery with her already in his heart.
只是我告訴你們，凡看見婦女就動淫念的，這人心裏已經與她犯姦淫了。

S.FORM: Irou ka paka-eirau ymhou-an [tou rÿh] ta matta oho ka tou ouwal, kmæt-hæ, 'aryng-an-ei pa-tau-wagh ymhou-an: ka mariang-ah ymhou-an ka 'ou-pag-in ta saä-sat ka pouk oho; ka assi sakitmouk-an-eih maryng ta voual oho tou kalæu-æu-an.

Irou ka paka-eirau ymhou-an [tou rÿh] ta matta oho ka tou ouwal, kmæt-hæ, 'aryng-an-ei pa-tau-wagh ymhou-an: ka mariang-ah ymhou-an ka 'ou-pag-in ta saäsat ka pouk oho; ka assi sakitmouk-an-eih maryng ta voual oho tou kalæu-æu-an.
S.TRANSL: InIndien dan nwe rechter ooghe u ergert treckt se upt ende werpt'se ban u : want Het is u nut dat een uwe leden bergae ende niet uw' geheel lichaem inde hetle gheworpen worde.
And if thy right eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into hell.
若是你的右眼叫你跌倒，就剜出來丟掉，寧可失去百體中的一體，不叫全身丟在地獄裏。

S.FORM: Irou ka paka-eirau ymhou-an [tou rÿh] ta rima-'oho ka ouwas, lukt-au, aryng-an-ei pa-tauwagh ta atta ymhou-an ka 'ou-pag-in ta saäsat la pouhk oho, ka assi saki-tmouk-an-ei maryng ta voual oho tou ka-læuæu-an.

Irou ka paka-eirau ymhou-an [tou rÿh] ta rima-'oho ka ouwas, lukt-au, aryng-an-ei pa-tauwagh ta atta ymhou-an ka 'ou-pag-in ta saäsat la pouhk oho, ka assi saki-tmouk-an-ei maryng ta voual oho tou ka-læuæu-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien uwe rechterhandt u ergerrt houdcse af ende werptse ban u: want het is u nut dat een uwe? leden bergae ende niet uw' geHeel lichaem in de helle geworpen worde.
And if thy right hand offend thee, cut it off, and cast it from thee: for it is profitable for thee that one of thy members should perish, and not that thy whole body should be cast into hell.
若是右手叫你跌倒，就砍下來丟掉，寧可失去百體中的一體，不叫全身下入地獄。」 （太19‧9；可10‧11－12；路16‧18）

S.FORM: Ni-pou-pænæh-en-appa ki sou, Heirou ti mang ta sau-tauag-ah ki keija-en tyn, ka pi ǣ-ah tyni-æn ki soulat ki sau-ta tauwa tauwag.
Ni-pou-pænæh-en-appa ki sou, Heirou ti mang ta sau-tauag-ah ki keija-en tyn, ka pi ǣ-ah tyni-æn ki soulat ki sau-ta tauwa tauwag.
S.TRANSL: Daer is oock geseght Soo wie syn wijf bertaecen fal die ghebe haer eenen kccheydtbrief.
It hath been said, Whosoever shall put away his wife, let him give her a writing of divorcement:
「又有話說：『人若休妻，就當給她休書。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-æn, Rou timamang-da ta sau-tauag-ah ki kei-'en tyn ka aou-si ki sou ki pa-rbou-rbo-en, papa rbou-rbo tyni-æn [ki pani ki paræh:] ka ti-mang ta meiæ-ah ki ni-saou-tauag-en-ato, tama-rarbou-rbo-appa ta teni.

Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-æn, Rou timamang-da ta sau-tauag-ah ki kei-'en tyn ka aou-si ki sou ki pa-rbou-rbo-en, papa rbou-rbo tyni-æn [ki pani ki paræh:] ka ti-mang ta meiæ-ah ki ni-saou-tauag-en-ato, tama-rarbou-rbo-appa ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Mae? ick segghe u Bar foo wie fijn wijf berlaeten fat anders dan uyt dorraecke ban hoererye die maeckt dat fp oberspel doer: ende soo wie de berlatene sal trouwen die doet oberspel.
But I say unto you, That whosoever shall put away his wife, saving for the cause of fornication, causeth her to commit adultery: and whosoever shall marry her that is divorced committeth adultery.
只是我告訴你們，凡休妻的，若不是為淫亂的緣故，就是叫她作淫婦了；人若娶這被休的婦人，也是犯姦淫了。」

S.FORM: Ni-tna-la-appa-kamou milling-igh, ka ni-pou-pænæ-'en ki sou ki na Mamoumou-an, Assi-kow dmikour-ah ki sou ki na saulalkut, ra pamut-ah-kow ki MEIRANG ki na sou-lalkut-oho
Ni-tna-la-appa-kamou millingigh, ka ni-pou-pænæ-'en ki sou ki na Mamoumou-an, Assi-kow dmikour-ah ki sou ki na saulalkut, ra pamut-ah-kow ki MEIRANG ki na sou-lalkut-oho
S.TRANSL: Webberomhebegygehoort dat [ban] den Ouden geseght is Ghp en sult den eedt niet breken marc? ghy sult den Heere uwe eeden houden.
Again, ye have heard that it hath been said by them of old time, Thou shalt not forswear thyself, but shalt perform unto the Lord thine oaths:
「你們又聽見有吩咐古人的話，說：『不可背誓，所起的誓總要向主謹守。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-æn, æn, Mih--kaqua ynnang saoulkit, ina saou-bullum alei ka keriang-an k'anna ka iraroung-en ki Alid:
Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-æn, æn, Mih--kaqua ynnang saoulkit, ina saou-bullum alei ka keriang-an k'anna ka iraroung-en ki Alid:
S.TRANSL: Mae; ick segghe u went Sweert gantschelick niet noch by den Hemel om dat hy is de throon Godts :
But I say unto you, Swear not at all; neither by heaven; for it is God's throne:
只是我告訴你們，甚麼誓都不可起。不可指着天起誓，因為天是上帝的座位；

S.FORM: Yna saou-Næi, alei ka kah-kaquân k'anna ki rahpal tyn-da: yna saou-Jerusalem alei ka euma k'anna ki si-bavau Mei-sasou ka irang.
Yna saou-Næi, alei ka kah-kaquân k'anna ki rahpal tyn-da: yna saou-Jerusalem alei ka euma k'anna ki si-bavau Mei-sasou ka irang.
S.TRANSL: Noch by de Aerde om dat sy is de boetbanck syner boeten : Noch by Jerusalem om dat sy is de ftadt des grooten honinghs.
Nor by the earth; for it is his footstool: neither by Jerusalem; for it is the city of the great King.
不可指着地起誓，因為地是他的腳凳；也不可指着耶路撒冷起誓，因為耶路撒冷是大君的京城；

S.FORM: Ina saou-bongo saou-lkut ki vongo, alei ka assi kow pa-si-lpough pa-si lala ki sasat ka voukugh paka-æudim lava paka-pou-le lava:
Ina saou-bongo saou-lkut ki vongo, alei ka assi kow pa-si-lpough pa-si lala ki sasat ka voukugh paka-æudim lava paka-pou-le lava:
S.TRANSL: Noch by u hooft en fult ghy niet sweeren om dat ghy niet een hayr kond wit ofte \wart maken.
Neither shalt thou swear by thy head, because thou canst not make one hair white or black.
又不可指着你的頭起誓，因為你不能使一根頭髮變黑變白了。

S.FORM: Ka k'ma-al-ato hynna ya sou-oumi, haei: assi, assi: ka-mamang ka masaoun malou af ki atta, tæ'i-katt'ë-en-atou-ra.
Ka k'ma-al-ato hynna ya sou-oumi, haei: assi, assi: kamamang ka masaoun malou af ki atta, tæ'i-katt'ë-en-atou-ra.
S.TRANSL: Mae? laet zijn uw' woordt ja ja : neen neen : wat boben desen is dat is uyt den boosen,
But let your communication be, Yea, yea; Nay, nay: for whatsoever is more than these cometh of evil.
你們的話，是，就說是；不是，就說不是；若再多說就是出於那惡者 。」 （路6‧29－30）

S.FORM: Ni-millingigh-kamou ka ni-pou-pænæ-'en ki sou, Matta ta mi-vli-ah ki matta, Waligh ta mivli-ah ki waligh.
Ni-millingigh-kamou ka ni-pou-pænæ-'en ki sou, Matta ta mi-vli-ah ki matta, Waligh ta mivli-ah ki waligh.
S.TRANSL: Ghy hebt ghehoort dat gheseght is Ooge om ooge ende tandt om tandt.
Ye have heard that it hath been said, An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth:
「你們聽見有話說：『以眼還眼，以牙還牙。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-an, ka ynang-ah-kamou mataka doumma ki matt'ë ki rÿh: tima-mang ta tmaplagh ymhou-an tou timi ka ouwal, pæu-paryt-ei tyni-æn ki idi-appa-'mhou-râ.
Râ ti jau ta k'ma ymoumi-an, ka ynang-ah-kamou mataka doumma ki matt'ë ki rÿh: tima-mang ta tmaplagh ymhou-an tou timi ka ouwal, pæu-paryt-ei tyni-æn ki idi-appa-'mhou-râ.
S.TRANSL: Maerick feggeu dat ghy den boosen meten wedesstaet: maer soo wie u op de rechter wange flaet keert hem oock de andere toe.
But I say unto you, That ye resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also.
只是我告訴你們，不要與惡人作對。有人打你的右臉，連左臉也轉過來由他打；

S.FORM: Ti mang ta mamoei maran-hi-rangil ymhou-an tou papæmæ-mæh-en mmoupagh ki koula-môgh-oho, 'ou-pagh-an-ei-appa tyni-ôn ki pahka kyssi-en-da.
Ti mang ta mamoei maran-hi-rangil ymhou-an tou papæmæ-mæh-en mmoupagh ki koula-môgh-oho, 'ou-pagh-an-ei-appa tyni-ôn ki pahka kyssi-en-da.
S.TRANSL: Ende soo yemant met u rechten wil ende uwen rock nemen laet hem oock den mantel. w
And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him have thy cloak also.
有人想要告你，要拿你的裏衣，連外衣也由他拿去；

S.FORM: Ka timamang râ ta mi ipyt pa-toulam tyni-æn ymhou-an sat katounnoun-an ki na ka-arourough ki rahpal, toulam-a-tyni-æn ki douha [katounnoun-an.]
Ka timamang râ ta mi ipyt pa-toulam tyni-æn ymhou-an sat katounnoun-an ki na ka-arourough ki rahpal, toulam-a-tyni-æn ki douha [katounnoun-an.]
S.TRANSL: Ende soo wie u sa dwinghen cen mijle te gaen gaet met hem twee [ mijlen.]
And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain.
有人強逼你走一里路，你就同他走二里；

S.FORM: Piǣ-æ tyni-æn ka tmou-mimia ymhou-an-ra, ka ynna dmi-kour ki mamoei mi-bæǣ ymhou-an.
Piǣ-æ tyni-æn ka tmoumimia ymhou-an-ra, ka ynna dmi-kour ki mamoei mi-bæǣ ymhou-an.
S.TRANSL: Geeft Geeft den ghenen die [yet] ban n bidt ende en keert u niet af ban den genen die ba u Lenen Heb; ghehoort
Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away.
有求你的，就給他；有向你借貸的，不可推辭。」 （路6‧27－28；32－36）

S.FORM: Ni-millingigh ta fou, Kavæango-au-mhou ta rarouma-hou râ, ka kava-hier-au-'mhou ta mæveuugh iymhou-an.
Ni-millingigh ta fou, Kavæango-au-mhou ta rarouma-hou râ, ka kava-hier-au-'mhou ta mæveuugh iymhou-an.
S.TRANSL: datte of ih ol Ghy sult nwen Naesten lief hebben ende uwen byandt sult ghy haten.
Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy.
「你們聽見有話說：『當愛你的鄰舍，恨你的仇敵。』

S.FORM: Râ ti jau ta massousou ymou-mi-æn, Kavæango-au ta mæveuuh ymoumi-æn, mattæ'i-riang-â nei-ni-æn ka mahkö-avavagh ymou-mi-æn-râ, kari-ang-ei neini-æn ka mavahier ymoumi-æn, mako-ali-lid-â alei neini-æn ka smamuk ka kmou-dyllough ymoumi-æn-ra.

Râ ti jau ta massousou ymou-mi-æn, Kavæango-au ta mæveuuh ymoumi-æn, mattæ'i-riang-â nei-ni-æn ka mahkö-avavagh ymou-mi-æn-râ, kari-ang-ei neini-æn ka mavahier ymoumi-æn, mako-ali-lid-â alei neini-æn ka smamuk ka kmou-dyllough ymoumi-æn-ra.
S.TRANSL: Maer ick segge n Hebt we bpanden lief regentse dien berbloecken doet wel den genen die u haten ende bidt boor de gene die u ghewelt doen ende die u berbolghen.
But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you;
只是我告訴你們，要愛你們的仇敵，為那逼迫你們的禱告。

S.FORM: Alei ka alalak-ah-kamou ki Raraman-oumi ka ǣia-toun-noun ki vullu-vullum. Ka pæ-æu-tætiag-hin tyn ta wǣi neini-æn ka assi mariang, neini-æn-appa ka mariang ki rÿh, ka pa-oudal-en tyn neini-æn ka matiktik, neini-æn-appa ka assi matiktik.

Alei ka alalak-ah-kamou ki Raraman-oumi ka ǣia-toun-noun ki vullu-vullum. Ka pæ-æu-tætiag-hin tyn ta wǣi neini-æn ka assi mariang, neini-æn-appa ka mariang ki rÿh, ka pa-oudal-en tyn neini-æn ka matiktik, neini-æn-appa ka assi matiktik.
S.TRANSL: Op dat Gp menght kinderen 3hn uwes Daders die in de Demelen is. Want hy doet sijie Sonne op gaen ober boote ende goede ende regent ober rechtbeerdighe ende onrechtberrdighe,
That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust.
這樣就可以作你們天父的兒子；因為他叫日頭照好人，也照歹人；降雨給義人，也給不義的人。

S.FORM: Ka rou kavæangō-'noumi neini-æn ka mavæangō ymoumi-æn, ka mang ta ouvavar'g-han-nou-mi? Assi kaua k'ma-hynna ki kidi ta Tama-'imugh?
Ka rou kavæangō-'noumi neini-æn ka mavæangō ymoumi-æn, ka mang ta ouvavar'g-han-nou-mi? Assi kaua k'ma-hynna ki kidi ta Tama-'imugh?
S.TRANSL: Want indien ghy lief hebt dienlief hebben wat loon hebt ghy Doen oock de tollenarrs niet het selbes
For if ye love them which love you, what reward have ye? do not even the publicans the same?
你們若單愛那愛你們的人，有甚麼賞賜呢？就是稅吏不也是這樣行嗎？

S.FORM: Irou ka dyk-kamou rmaja tmabe ki tæ'i-ä-ppara-oumi, ka mang ta pei-saoun-en-noumi ki tau ka rarouma? assi kaua k'ma-hynna ki na ringei ta Tama-imugh?
Irou ka dyk-kamou rmaja tmabe ki tæ'i-ä-ppara-oumi, ka mang ta pei-saoun-en-noumi ki tau ka rarouma? assi kaua k'ma-hynna ki na ringei ta Tama-imugh?
S.TRANSL: Endeindien ghy uwe broeders alleen groet wat dort ghy boben andere s Doen oock niet de tollenaers alsoo
And if ye salute your brethren only, what do ye more than others? do not even the publicans so?
你們若單請你弟兄的安，比人有甚麼長處呢？就是外邦人不也是這樣行嗎？

S.FORM: Anna ta matta-raæugh-â matiktik, mama ka matta-raæugh matiktik ta Raranian-oumi ka iatounnoun ki vullu-vullum. Ka annim ki lbægh ki soulat
Anna ta matta-raæugh-â matiktik, mama ka matta-raæugh matiktik ta Raranian-oumi ka iatounnoun ki vullu-vullum. Ka annim ki lbægh ki soulat
S.TRANSL: Weeflt
Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
所以，你們要完全，像你們的天父完全一樣。」
